# ishosting Provider

Interact with the ISHosting API to manage VPS instances and related resources.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) ISHosting API token. Can also be set via the ISHOSTING_API_TOKEN environment variable.
- `base_url` (String) ISHosting API base URL. Defaults to https://api.ishosting.com.
